long_description:
[COM]-RIAS-VPE-Pod-Crashloopbackoff [OSA] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/troubleshooting_pods_crash_loopback.html
TIP Situation: Observed kube-error-pod crashloopbackoff issue in rias-vpe
TIP Short Description: Pods in crashloopbackoff
 TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-network-ips:::rias-ng-jp-osa-osa22-prod:microservice:regional-vpe-controller-79dfb9f4cd-qdh8h
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    sum(kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{kube_pod_name=~"regional-vpe|regional-vpe-controller.*", reason!~"ContainerCreating" ,kube_cluster_name !~"us-south-ngdc-test.*"} * on(kube_node_name) group_left(kube_cluster_name) kube_node_sysdig_ready{kube_cluster_name=~".*rias.*"}) by (kube_node_name, kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name, reason) > 0 = 1
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'rias-ng-jp-osa-osa22-prod' and kube_node_name = '10.9.8.112' and kube_pod_name = 'regional-vpe-controller-79dfb9f4cd-qdh8h' and reason = 'CrashLoopBackOff'

Time:             12/05/2025 09:12 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://jp-osa.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/ee162ec9-ba7d-4c3e-b399-7cb2badb0efb?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F11541392%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [COM]-RIAS-VPE-Pod-Crashloopbackoff [OSA]
Description:  rias-vpe Pod Crashloopbackoff
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   sum(kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{kube_pod_name=~"regional-vpe|regional-vpe-controller.*", reason!~"ContainerCreating" ,kube_cluster_name !~"us-south-ngdc-test.*"} * on(kube_node_name) group_left(kube_cluster_name) kube_node_sysdig_ready{kube_cluster_name=~".*rias.*"}) by (kube_node_name, kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name, reason) > 0
Duration: 10 m
Alert URL:    https://jp-osa.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/ee162ec9-ba7d-4c3e-b399-7cb2badb0efb?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D213110
